title: bassia lanceolata
intro: Bassia lanceolata, also known as Bassia or lance-leaved Bassia, is a plant species native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bassia lanceolata include reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating digestive issues. Bassia lanceolata can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is also used in modern herbal medicine to create capsules, tinctures, and other preparations.
